summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Telit Cinterion B2B presentation website. All 13 sections render correctly, navigation functions properly, mobile responsiveness works, and all key features are implemented as specified.
passed_tests: All 13 sections present and rendering (hero, shift, problem, opportunity, proposal, build, strategic, howwework, phases, deliverables, model, why, closing)
Navigation bar is sticky and visible on scroll
Navigation links scroll to correct sections when clicked
Hero section displays correct headline 'One website can't win three markets' and both CTA buttons
Proposal section shows all 3 pillar cards (Connectivity, Platform, Modules Hub)
Phases section contains 4 phases with timeline
Business Model section shows 3 model options
Closing section has both 'Start the Conversation' and 'Download Proposal' buttons with correct text
All sections have proper data-testid attributes (63 elements total)
Mobile responsive navigation toggle works with 7 menu items
Framer Motion animations appear to be implemented (transform/opacity styles detected)
Premium dark aesthetic design is properly implemented
Smooth scroll functionality works across all tested navigation links
